name: dependency-management
description: Audits and maintains project dependencies. Flags outdated packages, security issues, and license risks.

issues.title: Audit dependencies and create upgrade plan
issues.description: Audit all project dependencies for outdated versions, known vulnerabilities, and deprecated packages. Document findings and create a prioritized upgrade plan.

routines.name: Dependency audit
routines.description: Scan for new vulnerabilities and outdated packages, apply safe patch updates.
